mapper.select: SELECT FORM_CD, FORM_NM FROM APRV_FORM_TYPE ORDER BY FORM_CD

SELECT e.EMP_NO, e.EMP_NM, e.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, e.POS_CD, p.POS_NM FROM EMP e LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE e.ACNT_ACT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY e.EMP_NO

SELECT e.EMP_NO, e.EMP_NM, e.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, e.POS_CD, p.POS_NM FROM DEPT d JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = d.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE d.DEL_YN = 'N' AND d.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO IS NOT NULL AND e.ACNT_ACT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY d.DEPT_CD
SELECT e.EMP_NO FROM EMP e JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD WHERE d.DEPT_TYPE_CD = 'HR01' AND d.DEL_YN = 'N' AND e.ACNT_ACT_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY e.EMP_NO
SELECT STAT_CD AS CODE, STAT_NM AS NAME FROM APRV_STAT_CD WHERE STAT_DIV = #{statDiv} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_ORD
SELECT DEPT_CD AS CODE, DEPT_NM AS NAME FROM DEPT WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY DEPT_NM
SELECT POS_CD AS CODE, POS_NM AS NAME FROM POSITION_MST WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY POS_LVL
SELECT e.EMP_NO, e.DEPT_CD, d.DEPT_NM, e.POS_CD, p.POS_NM, e.EMP_NM FROM EMP e LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE e.EMP_NO = #{empNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.ASSET_NO, s.EMP_NO, s.ASSET_TYPE_CD, s.ASSET_NM, s.FILE_PATH, s.USE_YN, s.REG_DTM, s.MOD_DTM FROM APRV_SIGN s WHERE s.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND s.ASSET_TYPE_CD = #{assetTypeCd} AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY s.REG_DTM DESC, s.ASSET_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APRV_SIGN ( ASSET_NO, EMP_NO, ASSET_TYPE_CD, ASSET_NM, FILE_PATH, USE_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( SEQ_ASSET_NO.NEXTVAL, #{empNo}, #{assetTypeCd}, #{assetNm}, #{filePath}, 'Y', SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT s.ASSET_NO, s.EMP_NO, s.ASSET_TYPE_CD, s.ASSET_NM, s.FILE_PATH, s.USE_YN, s.REG_DTM, s.MOD_DTM FROM APRV_SIGN s WHERE s.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND s.ASSET_TYPE_CD = #{assetTypeCd} AND s.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY s.REG_DTM DESC, s.ASSET_NO DESC
SELECT s.ASSET_NO, s.EMP_NO, s.ASSET_TYPE_CD, s.ASSET_NM, s.FILE_PATH, s.USE_YN, s.REG_DTM, s.MOD_DTM FROM APRV_SIGN s WHERE s.ASSET_NO = #{assetNo} AND s.EMP_NO = #{empNo}
SELECT SEQ_APRV_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT SEQ_LINE_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT SEQ_RETR_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APRV_DOC ( APRV_NO, FORM_CD, EMP_NO, APRV_TTL, APRV_CN, SUBMIT_DTM, FINAL_DTM, DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD, DOC_WRTR_POS_CD, DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, STAT_DIV, STAT_CD, HR_APPLY_YN, DOC_PDF_PATH, DOC_STAT_CMT ) VALUES ( #{aprvNo}, #{formCd}, #{empNo}, #{aprvTtl}, #{aprvCn}, #{submitDtm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{finalDtm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{docWrtrDeptCd}, #{docWrtrPosCd}, #{docWrtrEmpNm}, #{statDiv}, #{statCd}, #{hrApplyYn}, #{docPdfPath}, #{docStatCmt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT d.APRV_NO, d.FORM_CD, d.EMP_NO, d.APRV_TTL, d.APRV_CN, d.SUBMIT_DTM, d.FINAL_DTM, d.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD, d.DOC_WRTR_POS_CD, d.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM, d.STAT_DIV, d.STAT_CD, d.HR_APPLY_YN, d.DOC_PDF_PATH, d.DOC_STAT_CMT,
e.EMP_NM AS EMP_NM_JOIN, dp.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM_JOIN, pm.POS_NM AS POS_NM_JOIN, sc.STAT_NM AS STAT_NM_JOIN FROM APRV_DOC d LEFT JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = d.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT dp ON dp.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST pm ON pm.POS_CD = e.POS_CD LEFT JOIN APRV_STAT_CD sc ON sc.STAT_DIV = 'DOC' AND sc.STAT_CD = d.STAT_CD WHERE d.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE APRV_DOC SET FORM_CD = #{formCd}, APRV_TTL = #{aprvTtl}, APRV_CN = #{aprvCn}, DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}, DOC_WRTR_POS_CD = #{posCd}, DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM = #{empNm}, STAT_CD = #{statCd}, SUBMIT_DTM = #{submitDtm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
UPDATE APRV_DOC SET STAT_CD = 'IN_PROGRESS' WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND STAT_CD = 'SUBMITTED'
UPDATE APRV_DOC SET STAT_CD = 'APPROVED', FINAL_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
UPDATE APRV_DOC SET STAT_CD = 'APPROVED', FINAL_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND STAT_CD = 'SUBMITTED'
UPDATE APRV_DOC SET STAT_CD = 'REJECTED', FINAL_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
UPDATE APRV_DOC SET STAT_CD = 'CANCELED', FINAL_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APRV_LINE ( LINE_NO, APRV_NO, EMP_NO, APRV_SEQ, APRV_DTM, RJCT_RSN, APRVER_DEPT_CD, APRVER_POS_CD, APRVER_EMP_NM, STAT_DIV, STAT_CD ) VALUES ( #{lineNo}, #{aprvNo}, #{empNo}, #{aprvSeq}, #{aprvDtm,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{rjctRsn}, #{aprverDeptCd}, #{aprverPosCd}, #{aprverEmpNm}, #{statDiv}, #{statCd} )
mapper.select:
SELECT l.LINE_NO, l.APRV_NO, l.EMP_NO, l.APRV_SEQ, l.APRV_DTM, l.RJCT_RSN, l.APRVER_DEPT_CD, l.APRVER_POS_CD, l.APRVER_EMP_NM, l.STAT_DIV, l.STAT_CD,
d.DEPT_NM AS APRVER_DEPT_NM, p.POS_NM AS APRVER_POS_NM FROM APRV_LINE l LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = l.APRVER_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = l.APRVER_POS_CD WHERE l.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} ORDER BY l.APRV_SEQ

SELECT l.LINE_NO, l.APRV_NO, l.EMP_NO, l.APRV_SEQ, l.APRV_DTM, l.RJCT_RSN, l.APRVER_DEPT_CD, l.APRVER_POS_CD, l.APRVER_EMP_NM, l.STAT_DIV, l.STAT_CD FROM APRV_LINE l WHERE l.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND l.EMP_NO = #{empNo} AND l.STAT_CD = 'WAIT' AND l.APRV_SEQ = ( SELECT MIN(w.APRV_SEQ) FROM APRV_LINE w WHERE w.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND w.STAT_CD = 'WAIT' )
mapper.update: UPDATE APRV_LINE SET STAT_CD = 'REJECTED', RJCT_RSN = #{rjctRsn}, APRV_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE LINE_NO = #{lineNo} AND STAT_CD = 'WAIT'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM APRV_LINE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND STAT_CD = 'WAIT'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM APRV_LINE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND STAT_CD = 'APPROVED'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM APRV_LINE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND STAT_CD = 'APPROVED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APRV_REF ( APRV_NO, EMP_NO, REF_TYPE_CD, REF_STAT_CD, REF_DTM ) VALUES ( #{aprvNo}, #{empNo}, #{refTypeCd}, #{refStatCd}, NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT r.APRV_NO, r.EMP_NO, r.REF_TYPE_CD, r.REF_STAT_CD, r.REF_DTM, e.EMP_NM, d.DEPT_NM, p.POS_NM FROM APRV_REF r LEFT JOIN EMP e ON e.EMP_NO = r.EMP_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT d ON d.DEPT_CD = e.DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN POSITION_MST p ON p.POS_CD = e.POS_CD WHERE r.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} ORDER BY r.EMP_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APPR_FILE ( APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM, FILE_DIV ) VALUES ( SEQ_APPR_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{aprvNo}, #{fileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSDATE, 'N', NULL, #{fileDiv} )

INSERT INTO APPR_FILE ( APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM, FILE_DIV ) VALUES ( SEQ_APPR_FILE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{aprvNo}, #{fileNm}, #{saveFileNm}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileExt}, SYSDATE, 'N', NULL, 'SYSTEM_PDF' )
mapper.select: SELECT APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM FROM APPR_FILE WHERE APPR_FILE_NO = #{fileNo}

SELECT APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM FROM APPR_FILE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC, APPR_FILE_NO DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM FROM APPR_FILE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND FILE_EXT = 'pdf' ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC, APPR_FILE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT APPR_FILE_NO, APRV_NO, FILE_NM, SAVE_FILE_NM, FILE_PATH, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, REG_DTM, DEL_YN, DEL_DTM FROM APPR_FILE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} AND DEL_YN = 'N' AND FILE_DIV = #{fileDiv} ORDER BY REG_DTM DESC, APPR_FILE_NO DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT APRV_NO AS aprvNo, LEAVE_TYPE_CD AS leaveTypeCd, START_DTM AS startDtm, END_DTM AS endDtm, REASON AS reason FROM APRV_LEAVE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
SELECT APRV_NO AS aprvNo, LOA_TYPE_CD AS loaTypeCd, START_DTM AS startDtm, END_DTM AS endDtm, REASON AS reason FROM APRV_LOA WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
SELECT APRV_NO AS aprvNo, TARGET_POS_CD AS targetPosCd, EFFECTIVE_DTM AS effectiveDtm, REASON AS reason, TARGET_EMP_NO AS targetEmpNo FROM APRV_PROMOTION WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT APRV_NO AS aprvNo, TARGET_EMP_NO AS targetEmpNo, BEF_DEPT_CD AS befDeptCd, AFT_DEPT_CD AS aftDeptCd, APPT_TYPE_CD AS apptTypeCd, EFFECTIVE_DT AS effectiveDt, BEF_POS_CD AS befPosCd, AFT_POS_CD AS aftPosCd, REASON AS reason FROM APRV_APPOINTMENT WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
SELECT APRV_NO AS aprvNo, REQ_DEPT_CD AS reqDeptCd, REQ_CNT AS reqCnt, HOPE_DT AS hopeDt, REASON AS reason FROM APRV_HEADCOUNT WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}

SELECT RETR_NO AS retrNo, APRV_NO AS aprvNo, EMP_NO AS empNo, EXP_RETR_DT AS expRetrDt, RETR_RSN AS retrRsn, PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, CONF_RETR_DTM AS confRetrDtm, E_APPR_DOC_NO AS eApprDocNo, REQ_DTM AS reqDtm, PROC_END_DTM AS procEndDtm FROM APRV_RETIRE WHERE APRV_NO = #{aprvNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO APRV_LEAVE (APRV_NO, LEAVE_TYPE_CD, START_DTM, END_DTM, REASON) VALUES (#{aprvNo}, #{leaveTypeCd}, #{startDtm,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDtm,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason})
INSERT INTO APRV_LOA (APRV_NO, LOA_TYPE_CD, START_DTM, END_DTM, REASON) VALUES (#{aprvNo}, #{loaTypeCd}, #{startDtm,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDtm,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason})
INSERT INTO APRV_PROMOTION (APRV_NO, TARGET_POS_CD, EFFECTIVE_DTM, REASON, TARGET_EMP_NO) VALUES (#{aprvNo}, #{targetPosCd}, #{effectiveDtm,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason}, #{targetEmpNo})
INSERT INTO APRV_HEADCOUNT (APRV_NO, REQ_DEPT_CD, REQ_CNT, HOPE_DT, REASON) VALUES (#{aprvNo}, #{reqDeptCd}, #{reqCnt}, #{hopeDt,jdbcType=DATE}, #{reason})
INSERT INTO ASSET_HIST ( ASSET_TYPE_CD, LINE_NO, ASSET_NO, ASSET_NM_SNAP, FILE_PATH_SNAP, APPLIED_DTM ) VALUES ( #{assetTypeCd}, #{lineNo}, #{assetNo}, #{assetNmSnap}, #{filePathSnap}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT h.ASSET_TYPE_CD, h.LINE_NO, h.ASSET_NO, h.ASSET_NM_SNAP, h.FILE_PATH_SNAP, h.APPLIED_DTM FROM ASSET_HIST h JOIN APRV_LINE l ON l.LINE_NO = h.LINE_NO WHERE l.APRV_NO = #{aprvNo} ORDER BY h.APPLIED_DTM ASC
SELECT ASSET_TYPE_CD, LINE_NO, ASSET_NO, ASSET_NM_SNAP, FILE_PATH_SNAP, APPLIED_DTM FROM ASSET_HIST WHERE LINE_NO = #{lineNo} AND ASSET_TYPE_CD = #{assetTypeCd}
